projectDescription: A professional corporate Odoo 18 website theme for IT services companies, featuring service pages, portfolio, bidding request forms, and security plan pricing.
keyFeatures: Corporate website theme for Odoo 18 with blue/navy brand palette
Animated homepage hero with image carousel and statistics counters
Services pages for Software Development, Network Infrastructure, Technical Support, and IT Security
About/team page with company values and metrics
Bidding request form with multi-step workflow (draft → confirmed → approved/rejected)
Automated confirmation email upon bidding submission
Security plan pricing section with Standard and Premium tiers
JSON API endpoint for checking bidding request status
Access control: public create, user read/write, admin full access
publicApiSurface: POST /submit-bidding — Submit a new bidding request (CSRF protected)
POST /api/bidding-status — JSON API to check bidding request status by ID
